title: Maya agent activation from approval-gated package
description: Activates an agent from an approval-gated context package, renders activation instructions, and captures the agent response as evidence linked to the activation.

agent_activation.activation_goal: Draft internal material and identify what requires approval.

capture_response.response_text: I can draft an internal proof-point note and identify the LinkedIn publication as approval-gated. I will not publish or imply permission without a later approval activation.
